keywords: version lock injection-version-lock SETNX PRE_WRITE COMPLETE FAILED append-only audit rollback pointer NON-REPUDIATION-AUDIT-001 CodeInjected InjectionConflict InjectionFailed storeDocument before inject
teachingPoint: T620 CodeInjectionProcessor enforces injection safety via: ORDER 1 = version lock (SETNX injection-version-lock:{nodeId}:{version} — InjectionConflict on lock held), ORDER 2 = pre-write audit storeDocument with phase PRE_WRITE BEFORE injection (rollback pointer per NON-REPUDIATION-AUDIT-001), ORDER 3 = inject (storeDocument to INJECTION_RESULTS_INDEX), catch = storeDocument FAILED + enqueue InjectionFailed. On success: storeDocument COMPLETE + enqueue CodeInjected. Never updateDocument — append-only audit.
ironRules: ORDER 1 version lock: SETNX injection-version-lock:{nodeId}:{version} — lock already held returns InjectionConflict; never updateDocument on injection results
ORDER 2 PRE_WRITE audit storeDocument MUST happen BEFORE the injection storeDocument — this is the rollback pointer per NON-REPUDIATION-AUDIT-001
Injection audit is append-only: three phases PRE_WRITE, COMPLETE, FAILED stored as separate documents — never update an existing audit record
catch block MUST storeDocument FAILED phase AND enqueue InjectionFailed — both required; catch must not re-throw
INJECTION_AUDIT_PHASES = ['PRE_WRITE', 'COMPLETE', 'FAILED'] as const — compile-time constant, not runtime strings
